Headline: #54 Cicero Temporary Reroute near Cicero/Harrison
ShortDescription: 54 Cicero buses temp. rerouted : due to, police activity near Cicero/Harrison

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#54 Cicero buses temp. rerouted : due to, police activity near Cicero/Harrison

Northbound buses will operate via Cicero, Roosevelt, Kostner, Harrison and Cicero including the normal route streets.

Southbound buses will operate via Cicero, Flournoy, Laramie, Roosevelt and Cicero.

Allow extra travel time.
